High Court of Judicature at Patna, Bihar has Released Patna High Court Computer Operator Cum Typist Recruitment 2026 Notification. Those candidates who are interested in this Patna High Court Computer Operator Cum Typist Vacancy 2026 can Apply Online from 17/04/2026 to 16/05/2026. Read the notification for recruitment eligibility, post information, selection procedure, pay scale and all other information.

Patna High Court Computer Operator Cum Typist Eligibility
Bihar Patna High Court PHC Computer Operator Cum Typist

Bachelor Degree in in Any Stream from Any Recognized University Diploma/ Certificate of at least six month’s course in Computer Application Certificate in Typing proficiency of 40 words per minute in English and 30 words per minute in Hindi. More Eligibility Details Read the Notification.
